inputs.text:
## Visual Bible: Brotality - "The Bones Of God" (Psychedelic Interpretation)

**Fixed Colour Grade:** The palette will be a high-contrast desaturation, moving from deep, bruised indigos and muddy sepia tones ($\#2C003E$, $\#5B432D$) in the "descent" sections, gradually washing out towards ethereal, glowing cyan and pale gold ($\#B3E0FF$, $\#FFD700$) during the "ascent" and climax, maintaining a grainy, overexposed quality throughout. **Fixed Environment Anchor:** All action is staged within the ruins of a colossal, overgrown, and partially subterranean Beaux-Arts library, now reclaimed by aggressive, luminous jungle flora. **Fixed Character Description:** The band members are presented as figures of intense, almost ritualistic devotion; their stage attire blends highly textured, distressed black leather and heavy velvet (evoking old-world decadence) with accents of tarnished, etched brass hardware. Their performance energy should feel less like a concert and more like a psychedelic exorcism, where raw power is channeled through elaborate, almost spiritual physicality.

Visual Bible: Brotality - "The Bones Of God" (Psychedelic Interpretation). Fixed Colour Grade: The palette will be a high-contrast desaturation, moving from deep, bruised indigos and muddy sepia tones ($\#2C003E$, $\#5B432D$) in the "descent" sections, gradually washing out towards ethereal, glowing cyan and pale gold ($\#B3E0FF$, $\#FFD700$) during the "ascent" and climax, maintaining a grainy, overexposed quality throughout. Fixed Environment Anchor: All action is staged within the ruins of a colossal, overgrown, and partially subterranean Beaux-Arts library, now reclaimed by aggressive, luminous jungle flora. Fixed Character Description: The band members are presented as figures of intense, almost ritualistic devotion; their stage attire blends highly textured, distressed black leather and heavy velvet (evoking old-world decadence) with accents of tarnished, etched brass hardware. Their performance energy should feel less like a concert and more like a psychedelic exorcism, where raw power is channeled through elaborate, almost spiritual physicality. A wide, slow pan reveals the band members amidst massive, carnivorous-looking jungle flora that frames the ruins of the Beaux-Arts library. The light is trapped in deep shadows and bruised indigo hues. Cinematic, 16:9, grainy film quality.
